title:
Weekly Deaths in New Zealand 2024/2025
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Weekly Deaths in New Zealand 2024/2025
Hi, I'm trying to track down the weekly all-cause mortality data that was previously available on the NZ Stats Covid Portal. An enquiry to NZ Stats after the portal was shut down revealed that this information was supplied to them by the DIA. I wonder if you could point me to the relevant page for it?
I have been tabulating this data for several years from the NZ Stats Covid Portal until it was shut down in August.
Providing the original source of the data from DIA

### Response from Department of Internal Affairs
Status Request received
Comments 11 February 2025 

Tēnā koe  

OIA request 24/25 0677 Request for weekly all-cause mortality data 

Thank you for your Official Information Act (Act) request received by the Department of Internal Affairs (Department) on 21 January 2025 via the Data.govt.nz website.      

You requested –  

• I'm trying to track down the weekly all-cause mortality data that was previously available on the NZ Stats Covid Portal. An enquiry to NZ Stats after the portal was shut down revealed that this information was supplied to them by the DIA. I wonder if you could point me to the relevant page for it? 

In response to your request, I can provide you with the following information. 

I can advise that from 18 February 2025 the weekly all-cause mortality data will be published once a quarter, as a downloadable file in the Births and Deaths | Stats NZ release https://www.stats.govt.nz/publications?categoryFiltersID=139&dateFiltersID=10&filters=Information%20releases%2CBirths%20and%20deaths. The quarterly release is published mid-February, mid-May, mid-August, and mid-November. Release dates are notified in advance in Release calendar | Stats NZ https://www.stats.govt.nz/release-calendar. 

In case it may be of interest weekly data are also published on the following links: 

• STMF (Human Mortality Database) https://www.mortality.org/Data/STMF

• https://gist.github.com/thoughtfulbloke/4a01a497cee76437d1fdb387b85a0586 

I note the quarterly Births and Deaths | Stats NZ release will be the most up-to-date source for weekly deaths once it is published from 18 February 2025. 

I must therefore refuse your request pursuant to section 18(d) of the Act: that the information requested is or will soon be publicly available.  

As this information may be of interest to other members of the public, the Department has decided to proactively release a copy of this response on its website. All requestor data, including your name and contact details, will be removed prior to release. The released response will be made available here: www.dia.govt.nz/Official-Information-Act-Requests-2.  

You have the right to seek an investigation and review by the Ombudsman of this decision. Information about how to make a complaint is available at www.ombudsman.parliament.nz or freephone 0800 802 602.  

Ngā mihi 

Julia Taylor 
Manager Operational Policy and Official Correspondence 
Regulatory and Identity Services
- Michelle Reed (Department of Internal Affairs) 12 August 2025 at 15:28 03:28 pm (10 months ago) Tēnā koe Russell, As the information you have requested is believed to be held by, and more closely related to the functions of Statistics New Zealand, we are transferring your request to that agency for response, in accordance with section 14(b) of the Official Information Act 1982. You can expect to hear from the receiving agency shortly in regard to your request. You have the right to seek an investigation and review by the Ombudsman of this decision to transfer.  Information about how to make a complaint is available at www.ombudsman.parliament.nz or Freephone 0800 802 602.

- Russell Chambers (Requester) 5 August 2025 at 10:25 10:25 am (10 months ago) Hi, I'd like access data for weekly all-cause mortality data for New Zealand from January 1, 2025, to the present, in plain text or CSV format, as I lack Microsoft Office and can't open the Excel spreadsheets. Thank you.
Russell Chambers (Requester) 5 August 2025 at 10:25 10:25 am (10 months ago)
Hi, I'd like access data for weekly all-cause mortality data for New Zealand from January 1, 2025, to the present, in plain text or CSV format, as I lack Microsoft Office and can't open the Excel spreadsheets. Thank you.
